raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year>. Called in to Home Depot Customer Service with rerouting to appropriate section after getting the bill for a new Home Depot Consumer Credit Card that I did not apply for. I have an older Home Depot credit card that I am using and the account statement and new credit card mail had not been opened. Got information from the service person on what the fraud charges are : Refrigerator and Induction Stove. Had said to the service person that I nor any one of my family members or anyone that had authorized control of the card had bought those things. Got a fraud claim and investigation ensued. The total fraud claim is for {$4500.00} and a new account number was issued with no credit card sent out. XX/XX/year>. Got new mail from Home Depot determining that the unauthorized usage of the account was done by me and I am thus responsible for the charges in question. This is not true as I am not the one responsible for the charges listed. Provided documents include : Initial Fraud Claim Document, Final Fraud Claim Statement, Pictures of Refrigerators and Induction Stove from my house ( they are not the ones from the charges ), Transaction Details, Account Dashboard showing total Balance and other information. There are only XXXX authorized addresses and any other address would not be authorized by me. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was given another statement from Citi saying the same thing about how I was the one making the charges. Citi had taken down the {$1400.00} and the {$18.00} fraud charges but the {$3000.00} fraud charge is still there. Since Citi had taken down the other XXXX fraud charges and not the last {$3000.00} that should mean that {$3000.00} should also be considered a fraud charge as I did not make a purchase costing {$3000.00}.
